category_title: Non-compliant students who knowingly disregard directives and persist in misbehavior
minimal_context: The student is standing in the classroom while the teacher is attempting to start general instructional activities.
dialogue:
TUTOR: Please take your seat so we can begin the classroom instruction.

STUDENT: (Remains standing and knowingly disregards the verbal behavior control directive)

TUTOR: I need you to go to your seat now.

STUDENT: (Continues to stand, showing persistence in continued misbehavior despite the attempt to control it)

TUTOR: Are you going to sit down?

STUDENT: (Does not respond to the teacher's request within 20 seconds and still refuses to comply, persisting in the misbehavior)

options.A: Provide verbal reinforcement when the student exhibits the replacement behavior.
options.B: Remain calm and confident when dealing with the student's control issue.
options.C: Alter the original instructional plans to incorporate the student's contributions.
options.D: Frequently use colloquial expressions of affection when addressing the student.
